title: HR Intern/ Trainee - Recruitment #JTL
description:
Summary:
Join us as an HR Intern and dive into the fast-paced world of talent acquisition. This internship offers an exciting opportunity to work with industry-leading professionals, gain hands-on experience in recruitment, and learn how to connect the right talent with top-tier companies.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Talent Sourcing - Proactively source candidates through job portals, social media, networking, and referrals to build a strong pipeline of talent.
  • End-to-End Recruitment – Manage the full recruitment cycle including job postings, resume screening, interviews, and offer management.
  • Employer Branding – Represent the company professionally to candidates and actively promote the organization as an employer of choice.
  • Candidate Experience – Ensure timely communication, feedback, and smooth coordination throughout the recruitment process.
  • Market Insights - Stay updated on industry hiring trends, competitor activities, and salary benchmarks to remain competitive.

What You’ll Gain:

  • Opportunity to make a direct impact by bringing in talent that fuels business growth.
  • Exposure to diverse industries, roles, and professional networks.
  • A dynamic and people-focused career where no two days are the same.

What You’ll Learn:
- Real-world experience in recruitment strategies and techniques from professionals with years of expertise.
- Develop an understanding of the employment landscape and corporate hiring processes.
- Improve your interpersonal and communication skills by interacting with professionals across different sectors.


Job Requirements

  • Minimum CGE 'A' Levels OR Diploma OR Bachelors in any discipline, mentorship will be provided
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Ability to build strong relationships with candidates and hiring managers

Interested candidates please send in your resume to:

Topaz Liang Huimin (CEI No. R1104500), email to: topaz@recruitexpress.com.sg

EA License No: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
